name: 15q11_q13_GABA_receptor_SD
description: GABA-A receptor subunit cluster (GABRB3-GABRA5-GABRG3) at 15q12 lies between BP2 and BP3 of the Prader-Willi/Angelman region and is one of the main dosage-sensitive contributors to Dup15q-syndrome epilepsy and autism phenotypes. Small intragenic SDs and inter-paralog footprints with chr4/chr5 GABA-A clusters add allele-specific complexity.

architecture.internal_structure: GABRB3-GABRA5-GABRG3 tandemly arrayed; small (5-20 kb) intragenic SDs at 93-97% identity shared with chr4 GABRA2/GABRA4 and chr5 GABRA6/GABRG2 clusters.
